# Borussia Minerals
> Museum-quality mineral specimens from Arizona's Fat Jack Mine

## What We Sell
Fine mineral specimens — wulfenite, vanadinite, mimetite, cerussite, azurite, fluorite, malachite, and other collectible minerals — hand-selected from the historic Fat Jack Mine in Yavapai County, Arizona and other classic localities. Prices range from under $1,000 to $5,000+, with premium specimens available by inquiry.

## Pages
- / — Homepage, company overview, contact information
- /shop — Browse all available specimens with prices, images, and details
- /specimen/{id} — Individual specimen page with provenance, dimensions, crystal system, mineral group, and pricing
- /fat-jack — History and geology of the Fat Jack Mine
- /events — Upcoming mineral shows and exhibitions (Tucson, Denver, Munich)
